info_text:
Access information: 
For preventive conservation reasons 
you must not leave this door open.
Click on the character to talk to them or press the E key.
Here you will see important information messages.
Remember that you must place the object in its corresponding display case.
If you don't, objects will stop appearing in Reception and you won't be able to increase your experience.

You are in front of a storage shelf. 
Press 'I' to check its availability.

You have new material to inventory.
Go to the Object Reception Room.
Exit game
Resume
Save
Background sound
Language
Yes
No
Cancel
Each correct answer improves your experience as a curator.
Go to the museum Object Reception Room. You have a new object to inventory.
You have no objects to store.
This shelf does not belong to the correct period.
You need to restore the object before depositing it.

This object needs to be restored.
Go to the Restoration Laboratory.
Go to the Storage Area to place the object on its corresponding shelf.
Restoration Laboratory
Exhibition Halls
Library
Storage Areas
Object Reception Room
Service Entrance
Main Entrance
You can use this first aid kit when you have any health problem.
You can refill your insecticide can when your charge is not full.

Here you can recover all your energy.
You are going to need it.
Remember that you have new material to inventory in the Reception Room.
Meow! If you have something tasty for me, I can be your friend.

You have been very kind, Meow!
I think I'll keep you company for a while, Meow!
Remember that someone is waiting for you at the Service Entrance.
This is a museum with some truly interesting pieces.
center_text:
Welcome to the Museum of 
Archaeology and Prehistory.

Are you sure? 
This will erase all your progress 
and restart the game.

You have been defeated by the museum pests.
You can try again.

You have proven to be an exceptional museum curator.
Your knowledge has helped spread Archaeology and maintain our museum's collections.
